name: NEON SPACE DEFENDER
description: Space Defender is a fast-paced arcade space shooter where you fight endless waves of enemy asteroids. Choose your spaceship, upgrade weapons and armor, use bombs strategically, and survive as long as possible. Featuring smooth controls, radar system, upgrades, and mobile-friendly gameplay, this game delivers an intense sci-fi action experience.
